2012 (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $166,112,167Details
International Box Office $591,565,581
Worldwide Box Office $757,677,748
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $53,629,778
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $23,996,133
Total $77,625,911
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Earth’s billions of inhabitants are unaware that the planet has an expiration date. With the warnings of an American scientist, world leaders begin secret preparations for the survival of select members of society. When the global cataclysm finally occurs, failed writer Jackson Curtis tries to lead his family to safety as the world starts falling apart.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$65,237,614 (39.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:21.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,404 opening theaters/3,444 max. theaters, 6.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $264,683,077

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 13th, 2009 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 12th, 2009 (Wide) (Australia)
April 26th, 2012 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
October 4th, 2012 (Wide) (Denmark)
December 19th, 2012 (Wide) (Philippines)
Video Release: March 2nd, 2010 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense disaster sequences and some language
(Rating bulletin 2086 (Cert #44575), 9/9/2009)
PG for disaster images and brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2249, 11/14/2012)
Running Time: 158 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Plot point: Disaster, Extreme Weather
Social setting: End of the World
Subgenre: Survival Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Centropolis Entertainment, Columbia Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Earth’s billions of inhabitants are unaware that the planet has an expiration date. With the warnings of an American scientist, world leaders begin secret preparations for the survival of select members of society. When the global cataclysm finally occurs, failed writer Jackson Curtis tries to lead his family to safety as the world starts falling apart.
